title: The Traitor Inside Egghead
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Vegapunk as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An accident? I hope he didn't get caught in that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Den Den mushi, search tower C!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the den den den den mushi got damaged!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, did something happen to the helmet?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't hear their voices in my ear anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wooooo!!! Look at these jewels!\\' Lemme have em!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those jewels are expensive, I can't just let you have them because you asked!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it fine since everyone is leaving the island?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THIS IS HEAVY, CAN YOU HELP ME TAKE IT BACK?

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Noo, I only listen to Stella!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I should also tell you, those are man-made diamonds.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Whats going on with your eyes?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The future is nothing but a dream 😉

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
